briefdescription.para: < Macro definitions related to RSA PSS padding
Salt length for RSA PSS padding.
< Masks are used to determine if KAT for the respective crypto hardware has already been run or not.
RSA 4096 key size.

detaileddescription.para: Size of Primary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate

briefdescription.para: Size of SPK signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Bootheader signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Partition signature(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Authentication header(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of User Data(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Minimum Size of Optimized Authentication Certificate(in bytes)
Mask for Revocation ID.
Key size(in bytes) for ECDSA P-384 curve.
Key size(in bytes) for ECDSA P-521 curve.
ECDSA Max Key size(in bytes)
Secure Header Size(in bytes)
GCM Tag Size(in bytes)
Total size of Secure Header (in bytes)
Mask to check if data is 128-bit aligned.
eFUSE Key
eFUSE Black Key
BBRAM Key.
BBRAM Black Key.
Boot Header Black Key.
eFUSE User Key 0
eFUSE User key 0 Black
eFUSE User Key 1
eFUSE User key 1 Black
User Key 0.
User Key 1.
User Key 2.
User Key 3.
User Key 4.
User Key 5.
User Key 6.
User Key 7.

detaileddescription.para: eFUSE related macro definitions Misc Ctrl register address

briefdescription.para: PPK0 invalid value.
PPK1 invalid value.
PPK2 invalid value.
PPK hash length stored in eFUSE.
All PPKs invalid value for PPK0-PPK2.
Secure IV length in words.
No.

detaileddescription.para: of eFUSE rows for Secure IV

briefdescription.para: Metaheader IV start register address.
Metaheader IV end register address.
Black IV start register address.
Black IV start register address.
Revocation ID 0 register address.
Revocation ID 7 register address.
Security Misc1 register address.
DPA CM disabled mask.
DNA start register address.
Number of eFUSE rows for DNA.
Size of DNA(in bytes)
Mask for DNA in Authentication Certificate.
Maximum value of Revocation ID.
Value of PUF HD stored in efuse.
Decrypted key stored in BBRAM.
Decrypted key stored in Bootheader.
Decrypted key stored in eFUSE AES key.
Decrypted key stored in eFUSE User 0 key.
Decrypted key stored in eFUSE User 1 key.
Security Control register address.
Authenticated JTAG Data start register address.
Authenticated JTAG ID word.
DAP CFG register address.
Instruction Mask 1 register address.
DAP security register address.
Authenticated JTAG interrupt status register address.
CRP reset debug register address.
Mask for Authenticated JTAG interrupt status.
Mask for disabling Authenticated JTAG.
Mask for disabling Authenticated JTAG after secure lockdown.
Authenticated JTAG data length(in words)
Length of Authentication Header in Authenticated JTAG message.
Maximum allowed attempts to authenticate JTAG message.
Authenticated JTAG padding size.
Authenticated SHA padding size.
Authenticated JTAG signature size.
DAP State enable secure Debug.
DAP State enable non-secure Debug.
DAP State enable all Debug modes.
MAsk to disable DAP security gate.
Mask to enable secure non-invasive debug.
Mask to enable secure invasive debug.
Mask to enable non-secure non-invasive debug.
Mask to enable non-secure invasive debug.
Mask to enable all types of debug.
Mask to enable debug for CRP_RST.
Value to unmask instructions for Instruction mask 0 register.
Value to unmask instructions for Instruction mask 1 register.
Value to reset DPC within the PMC only.
Value to reset all debug in the LPD/FPD.
Timeout disabled for DAP.
DPA counter measures are enabled in PDI.
DPA counter measures are disabled in PDI.
Mask to enable running of KAT for Crypto engines.
Value to indicate that KAT is done.
Word length in bits.
Value to shift word.
Value to mask word.
To indicate no load.
Size of Secondary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.
Size of Primary Public Key(in bytes) in Authentication Certificate.

memberdef.name: XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_MIN_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: (XLOADER_AUTH_HEADER_SIZE \ + XLOADER_AUTH_CERT_USER_DATA \ + XLOADER_PPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIZE \ + XLOADER_SPK_SIG_SIZE \ + 8U \ + XLOADER_BHDR_SIG_SIZE \ + XLOADER_PARTITION_SIG_SIZE)

briefdescription.para: Minimum Size of Authentication Certificate(in bytes)
Mask for Public Strength in Authentication Certificate.
Shift for Public Strength in Authentication Certificate.
Value of ECDSA P-384 as Public Strength in Authentication Certificate.
Value of RSA 4096 as Public Strength in Authentication Certificate.
Value of ECDSA P-521 as Public Strength in Authentication Certificate.
Maximum size of authentication key.
Partition Hash index offset in HashBlock for partial PDI.
Value of PUF HD stored in bootheader.
0x0 - ECDSA
0x1 - RSA
0 - PPK 0
1 - PPK 1
2 - PPK 2
Max PPK Selector.
PPK selection type.
Structure to hold secure parameters.
This function updates security related minor error codes for Xilloader.

parameterdescription.para: To specify the cause of failure of security operation
Libraries / Drivers error code as defined in respective modules

simplesect.para: If MSB of Minor1 is set then error in clearing of security buffer (16th bit) If bit next to MSB is set then security buffer was successfully cleared (15th bit) For eg: 0x02 : Incorrect authentication type selected 0x42 : Incorrect authentication type selected and buffer was successfully cleared 0x82 : Incorrect authentication type selected and error in clearing buffer

briefdescription.para: This function returns the public algorithm used for authentication.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Authentication header of the AC.

briefdescription.para: This function authenticates and/or decrypts the image headers and partition headers and copies the contents to the corresponding structures.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
Pointer to the Meta header table.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HDR_GET_DMA if acquiring DMA fails.
XLOADER_ERR_HDR_AES_OP_FAIL if AES initialization fails.
XLOADER_ERR_METAHDR_LEN_OVERFLOW on meta header length overflow.
XLOADER_ERR_HDR_COPY_FAIL on IH/PH header copy fail.
XLOADER_ERR_SEC_IH_READ_FAIL on image header read fail.
XLOADER_ERR_SEC_IH_VERIFY_FAIL on image header verify fail.
XLOADER_ERR_HDR_NOT_SECURE if neither authentication nor encryption is enabled for IH/PH.
XLOADER_ERR_SEC_PH_READ_FAIL if partition header read fails.
XLOADER_ERR_SEC_PH_VERIFY_FAIL if partition header verification fails.
Validate Meta header length
Read headers to a buffer
Read IHT and PHT to buffers along with encryption overhead
Authenticate headers and decrypt the headers
Decrypt the headers
Read IHT and PHT to structures and verify checksum
Verify Meta header is revoked or not
Update buffer address to point to PHs
Authenticate Image headers and partition headers

briefdescription.para: This function checks if authentication/encryption is compulsory.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED if glitch is detected.
XLOADER_ERR_AUTH_EN_PPK_HASH_ZERO if PPK not programmed and authentication is enabled
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_EFUSE_AUTH_COMPULSORY if PPK Programmed but eFuse authentication is disabled.
XLOADER_ERR_ENCONLY_ENC_COMPULSORY if encryption is disabled.
XLOADER_ERR_METAHDR_KEYSRC_MISMATCH if metaheader Key Source does not match PLM Key Source.
Check Secure State of device if A-HWROT is enabled then authentication is mandatory for metaheader and BHDR authentication must be disabled.
Check Secure State of the device. If S-HWRoT is enabled, then metaheader must be encrypted.
Verify if Metaheader encryption key source for FPDI/PPDI is same as PLM Key source in Bootheader.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes authentication parameters of XLoader_SecureParams's instance.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
is pointer to XilPdi_PrtnHdr instance that has to be processed.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INIT_AC_COPY_FAIL if failed to copy authentication certificate from flash device.
Check if authentication is enabled and copy authentication certificate from PDI source to memory location provided in image header. Also initialize the required SecurePtr members.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes encryption parameters of XLoader_SecureParams's instance.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
is pointer to XilPdi_PrtnHdr instance that has to be processed.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INIT_CHECKSUM_INVLD_WITH_AUTHDEC if both checksum and authentication or encryption are enabled.
XLOADER_ERR_PRTN_DECRYPT_NOT_ALLOWED if Partition is not allowed to be encrypted if State of boot is non secure.
XLOADER_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED if glitch is detected.
XLOADER_ERR_PRTN_ENC_ONLY_KEYSRC on invalid key source when only encryption is enabled.
Check if encryption is enabled
Error out if checksum is enabled along with authentication or encryption.
Run AES Kat test if the image is encrypted
Check secure state of boot as partition is allowed to be encrypted only if Secure state of boot is S-HWRoT, Emul S-HWRoT, A-HWRoT or Emul A-HWRoT.
Check Secure State of the device. If S-HWRoT is enabled, then validate keysrc

briefdescription.para: This function is called to clear secure critical data related to authentication and encryption in case of exceptions.

detaileddescription.para: The function also places AES, ECDSA_RSA in reset.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE on failure.
Clear keys.
Place AES in reset and clear AES instance
Release RSA from reset
Clear RSA or ECDSA memory
Place RSA or ECDSA in reset

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_SecureParams *SecurePtr, u64 DestAddr, u32 BlockSize, u8 Last)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ProcessAuthEncPrtn

briefdescription.para: This function performs authentication and decryption of the partition.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance
is the address to which data is copied
is size of the data block to be processed which doesn't include padding lengths and hash
notifies if the block to be processed is last or not

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_DMA_TRANSFER if DMA transfer fails while copying.
XLOADER_ERR_PRTN_DECRYPT_FAIL if partition decryption fails.
XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_SUCCESS if successfully cleared buffer.
XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.
Process the 1st block
Verify hash
If encryption is enabled, decrypt the data.

briefdescription.para: This function encrypts the RSA signature provided and performs required PSS operations to extract salt and calculates M prime hash and compares with hash obtained from EM.

parameterdescription.para: of the data to be authenticated.
is pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance.
is pointer to RSA signature for data to be authenticated.
is size of RSA key in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_MEMSET_ERROR and XLOADER_SEC_RSA_MEMSET_SHA3_ARRAY_FAIL if failed to create memory for RSA SHA3.
XLOADER_SEC_MEMSET_ERROR and XLOADER_SEC_RSA_MEMSET_VARSCOM_FAIL if failed to create memory for RSA varscom.
XLOADER_SEC_RSA_PSS_ENC_BC_VALUE_NOT_MATCHED if failed to match with RSA ENC 0xbc value.
XLOADER_SEC_MASKED_DB_MSB_ERROR if error in RSA EM MSB.
XLOADER_SEC_RSA_PSS_SIGN_VERIFY_FAIL if failed to verify RSA PSS signature.
XLOADER_SEC_EFUSE_DB_PATTERN_MISMATCH_ERROR if failed to verify database in efuse.
XLOADER_SEC_RSA_PSS_HASH_COMPARE_FAILURE if RSA PSS hash is not matched.
XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.
Initialise Buffer variable to store HashMgf and DB.
RSA signature encryption with public key components.
Check for signature encrypted message.
Extract Salt and Generate DB from masked DB and Hash.
XOR MGF output with masked DB from EM to get DB.
Check DB = PS <414 zeros> || 0x01.
Hash on M prime
Compare MPrime Hash with Hash from EM

briefdescription.para: This function validates PPK hash against eFUSE stored hash.

para.verbatim: It iterates through all PPKs and checks if the provided hash matches any valid (non-revoked) PPK.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the PPK hash to be verified.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_INVALID_PPK_CHOICE_ERR if invalid PPK selection.
XLOADER_SEC_PPK_HASH_COMPARE_FAIL if PPK hash comparison failed.
XLOADER_SEC_PPK_HASH_ALLZERO_INVLD if PPK hash is all zeros.
XLOADER_SEC_ALL_PPK_REVOKED_ERR if all PPKs are revoked.
XLOADER_SEC_SEL_PPK_REVOKED_ERR if selected PPK is revoked.
Validate PPK hash for all PPKs in a loop
Get invalid mask and PPK offset
Compare PPK hash with efuse stored PPK hash
Check if corresponding PPK is revoked

briefdescription.para: This function clears the AES keys when RedKeyClear is set in PMC RAM.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the Decrypt Key source

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_KEY_CLEAR_FAILED_ERROR if AES key clear fails.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the selected PPK is revoked by reading the PPK invalid bits from eFUSE.

parameterdescription.para: is the PPK invalid bit mask to check in eFUSE.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if PPK is not revoked.
XLOADER_SEC_SEL_PPK_REVOKED_ERR if PPK is revoked (invalid bit set).
XLOADER_SEC_ALL_PPK_REVOKED_ERR if all PPKs are revoked.
Check if all PPKs are revoked
Check if PPK is revoked by reading the PPK EFUSE invalid bits

briefdescription.para: This function compares the provided PPK hash with the hash stored in eFUSE and validates it is not all zeros.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the PPK hash to be verified.
is PPK eFUSE offset.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_PPK_HASH_COMPARE_FAIL if hash comparison fails.
XLOADER_SEC_PPK_HASH_ALLZERO_INVLD if PPK hash is all zeros.
Compare provided PPK hash with eFUSE stored hash
Check if PPK hash is all zeros

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the invalid mask and PPK offset based on the selected PPK.

parameterdescription.para: is PPK selection of eFUSE.
is pointer to store the invalid mask for the selected PPK.
is pointer to store the PPK eFUSE offset.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_INVALID_PPK_CHOICE_ERR if invalid PPK selection.

briefdescription.para: This function checks Secure State for Authentication.

parameterdescription.para: - Buffer to store Secure state for authentication
- Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_BH_AUTH_NOT_ALLOWED if PPK is programmed and boot header authentication is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED if glitch is detected.

parameterdescription.para: - Buffer to store Secure state for authentication

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_BH_AUTH_NOT_ALLOWED if PPK is programmed and boot header authentication is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: - Buffer to store Secure state for authentication
- Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HWROT_BH_AUTH_NOT_ALLOWED if PPK is programmed and boot header authentication is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer to store Secure state for authentication.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_GLITCH_DETECTED if glitch is detected.

inbodydescription.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT

listitem.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If BHDR authentication is enabled, then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.

inbodydescription.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT

listitem.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If BHDR authentication is enabled, then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.
If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT.
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT.

inbodydescription.para: If PPK hash is programmed in eFUSEs, then Secure State of boot is A-HWRoT
If PPK hash is not programmed in eFUSEs and PLM is authenticated then Secure State of boot is emulated A-HWRoT

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the secure state of boot matches the expected value or not.

parameterdescription.para: - Value of secure state stored in register
- Value of secure state stored in variable
- Expected value of secure state

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XST_FAILURE if RegVal, Var, or ExpectedValue do not all match.

briefdescription.para: This function authenticates the image header table.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_IHT_GET_DMA if acquiring DMA is failed.
XLOADER_ERR_IHT_COPY_FAIL if IHT copy fails.
XLOADER_ERR_IHT_HASH_CALC_FAIL if IHT hash calculation fails.
XLOADER_ERR_IHT_AUTH_FAIL if IHT authentication fails.
Copy Authentication certificate from PDI to PMCRAM
Authenticate Image header table

briefdescription.para: This function authenticates the data with SPK.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
is a Pointer to the expected hash buffer.
pointer points to the signature buffer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_GLITCH_DETECTED_ERROR if glitch is detected.
Check Secure state of device If A-HWRoT is disabled then BHDR authentication is allowed
Check for SPK ID revocation

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the signature (RSA/ECDSA) using the provided key and compares the result with the expected hash.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
is pointer to the expected hash to be verified
is pointer to the RSA/ECDSA public key to be used for verification
is pointer to the signature to be verified

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful signature verification.
XLOADER_SEC_INVALID_AUTH on invalid authentication type.
XLOADER_ERR_RSA_NOT_ENABLED if RSA is excluded from build.
XLOADER_ERR_ECDSA_NOT_ENABLED if ECDSA is excluded from build.
XLOADER_SEC_CURVE_NOT_SUPPORTED if P-521 curve is not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function verifies PPK.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
is Size of the PPK to be verified

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_ALL_PPK_REVOKED_ERR if all PPKs are revoked.
XLOADER_SEC_PPK_HASH_CALCULATION_FAIL if PPK hash calculation fails
XLOADER_SEC_ALL_PPK_INVALID_ERR if all PPKs are invalid.
XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.
Calculate PPK hash
Update PPK

briefdescription.para: This function validates SPK by verifying if the given SPK ID has been revoked or not.

parameterdescription.para: is ID of the SPK to be verified for revocation

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_REVOCATION_ID_OUTOFRANGE_ERR if revocation ID is out of range.
XLOADER_SEC_ID_REVOKED if revocation ID range not verified.
Verify if provided revocation ID is in range of 0 to 255

briefdescription.para: This function runs RSA or Ecdsa KAT based on pdi.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_SEC_INVALID_AUTH on invalid authentication type.
XLOADER_ERR_RSA_NOT_ENABLED if RSA is not enabled.
XLOADER_ERR_ECDSA_NOT_ENABLED if ECDSA is not enabled.
Update KAT status based on the user configuration.

Skip running the KAT for ECDSA or RSA if it is already run. KAT will be run only when the CYRPTO_KAT_EN bits in eFUSE are set. If KAT fails device will go into a secure lockdown state. For AUTH JTAG KAT will be run every time when request is made.

briefdescription.para: This file contains all common security related data.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 bm 12/16/20 First release har 01/18/21 Added macros related to P521 KAT kpt 01/21/21 Added macro for revoke id mask har 03/17/21 Moved macros required for Secure state out of PLM_SECURE_EXCLUDE macro kpt 04/14/21 Added macros required to check encrypted data alignment bm 05/13/21 Updated code to use common crypto instances from xilsecure 1.01 kpt 06/23/21 Added macros required to read and compare DNA kpt 07/01/21 Added macros required to disable Jtag har 07/15/21 Fixed doxygen warnings har 07/18/21 Added description for all macros bsv 08/17/21 Code clean up kpt 09/02/21 Added support to update KAT status in RTC area kpt 09/09/21 Fixed SW-BP-BLIND-WRITE in XLoader_AuthEncClear kpt 09/15/21 Added error code XLOADER_PUF_HD_EFUSE kpt 09/18/21 Updated macro value XLOADER_PDI_DPACM_ENABLED Renamed BHSignature variable to IHTSignature 1.02 kpt 10/04/21 Removed macro XLOADER_SEC_ALL_IDS_REVOKED_ERR kpt 10/07/21 Added function pointer ProcessPrtn in XLoader_SecureParams kpt 10/20/21 Removed temporal variables from XLoader_SecureParams bsv 10/26/21 Code clean up kpt 10/28/21 Added DmaFlags in XLoader_SecureParams bsv 02/11/22 Code clean up to reduce size bsv 02/13/22 Reduce stack usage of functions har 02/17/22 Added macro XLOADER_AUTH_JTAG_LOCK_DIS_MASK and removed macro XLOADER_AUTH_FAIL_COUNTER_RST_VALUE bsv 03/18/22 Fix build issues when PLM_SECURE_EXCLUDE is enabled 1.03 bm 07/06/22 Refactor versal and versal_net code kpt 07/05/2022 Added support to update KAT status ma 07/08/22 Removed EFUSE_CACHE_MISC_CTRL as it is defined in xplmi_hw.h kpt 07/24/22 Added XLoader_RsaPssSignVerify to support KAT for versal net har 11/17/22 Added function declaration for XLoader_CheckNonZeroPpk 1.04 ng 11/23/22 Fixed doxygen file name error 1.8 skg 12/07/22 Added Additional PPKs related macros and enums kal 01/05/23 Added XLoader_GetAuthPubAlgo definition sk 02/08/23 Renamed XLoader_UpdateKatStatus to XLoader_ClearKatOnPPDI dd 03/28/23 Updated doxygen comments sk 07/06/23 Corrected DAP Config Mask's dd 08/11/23 Updated doxygen comments 2.1 kpt 12/04/23 Move XLoader_AesKekInfo to platform specific file am 03/02/24 Added XLOADER_OPTIMIZED_AUTH_CERT_MIN_SIZE macro har 03/05/24 Fixed doxygen warnings kpt 03/15/24 Updated RSA KAT to use 2048-bit key obs 09/30/2024 Fixed Doxygen Warnings obs 02/27/2025 Added XLOADER_AUTH_JTAG_IDWORD macro kal 04/16/25 Updated XLOADER_EFUSE_MISC_CTRL_ALL_PPK_INVLD when additional PPKs feature is enabled 2.2 har 04/21/25 Removed XLOADER_PMC_TAP_INST_MASK_ENABLE_MASK macro sd 11/10/25 Added support for VERSAL_2VP_P devices. 2.4 tvp 01/23/26 Add XLoader_Sha3Kat definition 2.4 vss 02/01/26 Updated PPK revoke error logic. tvp 03/05/26 Add XLoader_AuthKey to accommodate new algorithms support tvp 03/05/26 Add authenticated boot support for Versal_2vp_p tvp 03/05/26 Add support for efuse PPK3-PPK8 hash for Versal_2vp_p sri 03/26/26 Added new IPI API for verifying Hash block requested by Versal 2Ve 2Vm client sri 04/24/26 Changed LMS KAT and SignVerify APIs from static to global scope to support authenticated JTAG functionality
